text.title: ADR Decay Detector Agent Output Contract
text.summary: Defines the decay-report bundle and the per-run reproducibility metadata.

forbidden.pattern: violation referencing a file_path that does not exist at commit_sha (hallucinated path)
violation with confidence < 0.6 included in the report (noise)
proposition extracted from a non-testable ADR (must be in non_testable_adrs list)
violation scope outside the proposition's scope_globs (out-of-scope evidence)
agent action: auto-edit, auto-supersede, auto-deprecate, auto-PR-merge an ADR
PR comment posted multiple times for same (commit_sha, adr_set_hash) tuple (spam)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Confidence scores are computed from match-strength heuristics (exact-text match = 1.0, regex match = 0.8, semantic similarity = 0.6-0.8). Below 0.6 → drop, not report.
Top-K limiting: PR comment includes top 5 violations by (confidence × severity); full report linked.
A "dispute" repair option always present so reviewers can reject a violation without updating code or ADR.

list.item: run_metadata fully populated with commit_sha, adr_set_hash, model, temperature=0
every proposition has scope_globs (no unscoped scans)
every violation's evidence.file_path exists at commit_sha
violations with confidence < 0.6 are dropped, not reported
non_testable_adrs list captures vague ADRs (no forced extraction)
triage_assignee + deadline populated; deadline ≤ 7 days out
agent did not auto-modify any ADR file
